title: OddsAPI Quota Policy Review — Paper Proposal

current_state.cap_logic: if api_calls_today >= 2: skip and log 'cap=2 reached, calls=N'
current_state.scope: OddsAPI MLB external closing only (not TSL)

timeline.note: In-memory state reset to 0 on restart
QUOTA EXHAUSTED. All subsequent cycles blocked.

mode_1_restart_state_loss.description: Daemon restart causes api_calls_today counter to reset to 0, immediately re-consuming the full daily budget in the first 30 minutes after restart.
mode_1_restart_state_loss.impact: Full daily quota consumed before closing window on any restart day

mode_2_first_come_first_served.description: Current logic allocates quota to whichever cycle runs first, with no reservation for the closing window.
mode_2_first_come_first_served.impact: Even without restarts, non-closing-window calls could exhaust budget

mode_3_cap_too_low.description: cap=2 provides zero fault tolerance. One unexpected restart or two early-day calls = complete closing window blackout.
mode_3_cap_too_low.note: Cap value may reflect actual OddsAPI tier subscription limit.

POLICY_A_CLOSING_WINDOW_RESERVE.description: Reserve exactly 1 call for the closing window. Allow at most cap-1 calls outside the closing window per day.
POLICY_A_CLOSING_WINDOW_RESERVE.implementation_sketch: Define closing_window_start_utc and closing_window_end_utc per match. Before calling OddsAPI outside the window: check if (api_calls_today + calls_reserved) >= cap. calls_reserved=1 if any match has a future closing window today.
POLICY_A_CLOSING_WINDOW_RESERVE.tradeoff: Reduces morning/afternoon data freshness by 1 call per day
POLICY_A_CLOSING_WINDOW_RESERVE.p26k_outcome_if_applied: At least 1 closing-window call would have been available at 07:10Z

POLICY_B_PERSIST_QUOTA_STATE.description: Persist api_calls_today to disk (e.g. data/mlb_context/external_closing_state.json already exists). On daemon restart, reload from disk instead of resetting to 0.
POLICY_B_PERSIST_QUOTA_STATE.implementation_sketch: Write api_calls_today to disk after each increment. On startup, read from disk and validate date matches today (UTC).
POLICY_B_PERSIST_QUOTA_STATE.tradeoff: Requires atomic write; race condition if multiple daemon processes run
POLICY_B_PERSIST_QUOTA_STATE.p26k_outcome_if_applied: Restart at 02:09Z would have seen api_calls_today=N (prior value), preventing re-consumption

POLICY_C_COMBINED.description: Apply POLICY_B (persist state) + POLICY_A (reserve closing window call). Best protection against both failure modes.

recommendation.rationale: Addresses both restart-state-loss and first-come-first-served failure modes. Minimal complexity increase.
recommendation.next_action: IF cap=2 reflects actual OddsAPI subscription tier, escalate subscription review first. POLICY_C is viable regardless of cap value.
recommendation.note: No code changes made. This is a paper-only policy proposal under P27A.
